Home / Services / Additional Services / Website Care Plan

🛡️ Website Care Plan

Keep your website secure, fast, and up-to-date without lifting a finger. Our monthly care plan covers everything: reliable hosting, SSL certificate management, daily automated backups (with easy restore if anything goes wrong), proactive security monitoring and malware scanning, regular CMS and plugin updates, uptime monitoring, and a monthly performance report so you can see exactly how your site is doing. Think of it as an insurance policy for your online presence — for less than the cost of a single hour of emergency developer time.

Service Details

Category: Additional Services

Credits Price: 40 credits (approx. £50)

Turnaround: Ongoing monthly

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Ongoing monthly
Book Website Care Plan Now
